importantNote: This file documents the intended GoHighLevel stack. Store the Private Integration Token in GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN; do not commit the real token.

workflowActions.name: Create or update contact
workflowActions.notes: Map name, email, phone, propertyAddress, propertyType, notes, photo file names, and standardized source/lead tags from the website payload.

workflowActions.name: Create opportunity
workflowActions.notes: Place the opportunity in the Ready White Customer Jobs pipeline at the New Lead stage.

workflowActions.name: Request missing photos
workflowActions.trigger: Lead submitted without complete room/worst-wall photos
workflowActions.notes: Move the opportunity to Photos Requested and send the customer the required photo checklist.

workflowActions.name: Send instant SMS
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for contacting Ready White. We received your property refresh request. Please send 1 wide photo of each room and 1 photo of the worst wall so we can verify scope quickly.

workflowActions.name: Send confirmation email
workflowActions.subject: Ready White received your property request
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for reaching out to Ready White. We received your property refresh request and will review the photos, scope, and next steps.

workflowActions.name: Send internal notification
workflowActions.notes: Notify the Ready White team with contact details, property address, property type, timeline, notes, submitted photo file names, and missing-photo flags.

workflowActions.name: Stale lead recovery
workflowActions.trigger: Lead remains in Photos Requested, Quote Sent, or Follow-Up beyond SLA
workflowActions.notes: Prioritize SMS first, then email, then internal follow-up task for high-value property-manager or investor leads.
